name: load-bearing-uncertainty
triggers: A recommendation, verdict, or go/no-go conclusion someone will act on is being produced
At least one input to the conclusion was not observed or recomputed this session
The draft hedges inside the conclusion (assumes/probably/likely) without isolating which assumption bears the load
counterindications: Every input was verified live this session; nothing to isolate
No conclusion is being offered yet — exploratory work with no verdict
